parts.text:
Wait, I need to reconsider the transformation. Looking at the original code:

```java
new HexOf(new BytesOf(sha.digest())).asString()
```

This:
1. `sha.digest()` returns a `byte[]`
2. `new BytesOf(sha.digest())` wraps the byte array
3. `new HexOf(...)` converts to hex
4. `.asString()` returns the hex string

The correct Java standard equivalent would be:
```java
String.format("%064x", new BigInteger(1, sha.digest()))
```

But wait, I need to check if `sha` is a `MessageDigest`. Looking at the code:
- In `DigestFromContent.java`: `sha` is `MessageDigest`, and `sha.digest()` returns `byte[]`
- In `DigestedFlowable.java`: `sha` is `MessageDigest`, and `sha.digest()` returns `byte[]`

So the transformation should replace:
```java
new HexOf(new BytesOf(sha.digest())).asString()
```
with:
```java
String.format("%064x", new BigInteger(1, sha.digest()))
```

But I also need to add the `java.math.BigInteger` import.

Let me fix the Main.java to properly handle this transformation.

6: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.MethodCallExpr;
7: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.NameExpr;
8: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.ObjectCreationExpr;
9: import com.github.javaparser.ast.expr.StringLiteralExpr;
10: import java.io.IOException;
11: import java.nio.file.Files;
12: import java.nio.file.Path;
13: import java.nio.file.Paths;
14: import java.util.stream.Stream;
15: 
16: public class Main {
17:     public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException {
18:         if (args.length < 1) {
19:             System.err.println("Usage: java github.chains.Main <source-directory>");
20:             System.exit(1);
21:         }
22:         
23:         Path sourceDir = Paths.get(args[0]);
24:         
25:         try (Stream<Path> paths = Files.walk(sourceDir)) {
26:             paths.filter(Files::isRegularFile)
27:                  .filter(p -> p.toString().endsWith(".java"))
28:                  .forEach(Main::transformFile);
29:         }
30:     }
31:     
32:     private static void transformFile(Path path) {
33:         try {
34:             CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(path);
35:             boolean[] modified = {false};
36:             
37:             if (cu.getImports().removeIf(
38:                     imp -> imp.getNameAsString().equals("org.cactoos.io.BytesOf") ||
39:                            imp.getNameAsString().equals("org.cactoos.text.HexOf"))) {
40:                 modified[0] = true;
41:             }
42:             
43:             cu.findAll(ObjectCreationExpr.class).stream()
44:               .filter(Main::isHexOfBytesOf)
45:               .forEach(expr -> {
46:                   Expression replacement = createHexConversion(expr);
47:                   expr.replace(replacement);
48:                   modified[0] = true;
49:               });
50:             
51:             if (modified[0]) {
52:                 cu.addImport("java.math.BigInteger");
53:                 Files.writeString(path, cu.toString());
54:                 System.out.println("Transformed: " + path);
55:             }
56:         } catch (Exception e) {
57:             System.err.println("Error processing " + path + ": " + e.getMessage());
58:         }
59:     }
60:             
61:             cu.findAll(ObjectCreationExpr.class).stream()
62:               .filter(Main::isHexOfBytesOf)
63:               .forEach(expr -> {
64:                   Expression replacement = createHexConversion(expr);
65:                   expr.replace(replacement);
66:                   modified[0] = true;
67:               });
68:             
69:             if (modified[0]) {
70:                 cu.addImport("java.math.BigInteger");
71:                 Files.writeString(path, cu.toString());
72:                 System.out.println("Transformed: " + path);
73:             }
74:         } catch (Exception e) {
75:             System.err.println("Error processing " + path + ": " + e.getMessage());
76:         }
77:     }
78:     
79:     private static boolean isHexOfBytesOf(ObjectCreationExpr expr) {
80:         if (!expr.getType().getNameAsString().equals("HexOf")) {
81:             return false;
82:         }
83:         
84:         if (expr.getArguments().size() != 1) {
85:             return false;
86:         }
87:         
88:         Expression arg = expr.getArgument(0);
89:         if (!(arg instanceof ObjectCreationExpr)) {
90:             return false;
91:         }
92:         
93:         ObjectCreationExpr inner = (ObjectCreationExpr) arg;
94:         return inner.getType().getNameAsString().equals("BytesOf");
95:     }
96:     
97:     private static Expression createHexConversion(ObjectCreationExpr hexOfExpr) {
98:         Expression innerExpr = hexOfExpr.getArgument(0);
99:         if (!(innerExpr instanceof ObjectCreationExpr)) {
100:             return hexOfExpr;
101:         }
102:         
103:         ObjectCreationExpr bytesOfExpr = (ObjectCreationExpr) innerExpr;
104:         if (bytesOfExpr.getArguments().isEmpty()) {
105:             return hexOfExpr;
106:         }
107:         
108:         Expression digestExpr = bytesOfExpr.getArgument(0);
109:         
110:         MethodCallExpr formatCall = new MethodCallExpr(
111:             new NameExpr("String"),
112:             "format"
113:         );
114:         formatCall.addArgument(new StringLiteralExpr("%064x"));
115:         
116:         ObjectCreationExpr bigInteger = new ObjectCreationExpr(
117:             null,
118:             new com.github.javaparser.ast.type.ClassOrInterfaceType(null, "BigInteger"),
119:             null
120:         );
121:         bigInteger.addArgument(new NameExpr("1"));
122:         bigInteger.addArgument(digestExpr.clone());
123:         
124:         formatCall.addArgument(bigInteger);

<content>1: /*
2:  * The MIT License (MIT) Copyright (c) 2020-2021 artipie.com
3:  * https://github.com/artipie/docker-adapter/LICENSE.txt
4:  */
5: package com.artipie.docker.misc;
6: 
7: import com.artipie.asto.Remaining;
8: import com.artipie.asto.ext.Digests;
9: import com.artipie.docker.Digest;
10: import io.reactivex.Flowable;
11: import java.nio.ByteBuffer;
12: import java.security.MessageDigest;
13: import java.util.Objects;
14: import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicReference;
15: import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
16: import org.reactivestreams.Subscriber;
17: import java.math.BigInteger;
18: 
19: /**
20:  * {@link Flowable} that calculates digest of origin {@link Publisher} bytes when they pass by.
21:  *
22:  * @since 0.12
23:  */
24: public final class DigestedFlowable extends Flowable<ByteBuffer> {
25: 
26:     /**
27:      * Origin publisher.
28:      */
29:     private final Publisher<ByteBuffer> origin;
30: 
31:     /**
32:      * Calculated digest.
33:      */
34:     private final AtomicReference<Digest> dig;
35: 
36:     /**
37:      * Ctor.
38:      *
39:      * @param origin Origin publisher.
40:      */
41:     public DigestedFlowable(final Publisher<ByteBuffer> origin) {
42:         this.dig = new AtomicReference<>();
43:         this.origin = origin;
44:     }
45: 
46:     @Override
47:     public void subscribeActual(final Subscriber<? super ByteBuffer> subscriber) {
48:         final MessageDigest sha = Digests.SHA256.get();
49:         Flowable.fromPublisher(this.origin).map(buf -> {
50:             sha.update(new Remaining(buf, true).bytes());
51:             return buf;
52:         }).doOnComplete(() -> this.dig.set(new Digest.Sha256(String.format("%064x", new BigInteger(1, sha.digest())).asString()))).subscribe(subscriber);
53:     }
54: 
55:     /**
56:      * Calculated digest.
57:      *
58:      * @return Digest.
59:      */
60:     public Digest digest() {
61:         return Objects.requireNonNull(this.dig.get(), "Digest is not yet calculated.");
62:     }
63: }

(End of file - total 63 lines)
</content>
